findings.title: Controls are real and operable
findings.message: The required evidence was not verified.
evidence: Controls were inventoried but live interaction replay was not completed.

findings.title: Responsive layouts do not clip or collide
findings.message: The required evidence was not verified.
evidence: The responsive viewport capture was not reliable enough to verify mobile clipping or overlap.

findings.title: Non-trivial motion has a reduced-motion path
findings.message: The required evidence was not verified.
evidence: Motion durations were observed, but reduced-motion behavior was not replayed.

acceptedContexts.title: Decorative effects have a product or interaction purpose
evidence: Long ambient media motion supports the cinematic landing experience and remains visually subordinate to navigation.
acceptedContexts.rationale: Retain the ambient motion language, subject to reduced-motion verification.

acceptedContexts.title: Fashion-pattern signals remain advisory
evidence: The design intentionally uses near-black surfaces and a saturated cyan signal color.
acceptedContexts.rationale: These choices form a coherent franchise-specific signal system and are not generic defaults.
